body.raw:
Hey, I’m Vishal.

I’m a mechanical engineering and data science graduate from the Indian Institute of Technology Madras, and I work as a Strategy & Business Design Analyst at Monitor Deloitte.

In my day job, I work with clients on business strategy and contribute to business development efforts for the firm. Outside that, I track emerging deep tech and build when something stands out to me.

This site is a log of my positions and curiosities. I also keep a few things here that enrich my life, like reading and training.
